chapter_title.en: Chapter on a Muslim Killing a Dhimmi, a Slave, a Mudabbar, or a Mukatab, or Them Killing a Muslim

text: رِوَايَةِ اَلسَّكُونِيِّ قَالَ قَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "جِرَاحَاتُ اَلْعَبِيدِ عَلَى نَحْوِ جِرَاحَاتِ اَلْأَحْرَارِ فِي اَلثَّمَنِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5269 - In the narration of Al-Sakuni, Commander of the Faithful (as) said:
"The injuries of slaves are to be compensated in the same manner as the injuries of free people, according to their value."
